title: Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata is classified within the family Rosaceae. This family includes a wide range of flowering plants, commonly known as the rose family. It is part of the genus Karpatiosorbus, a group of shrubs or small trees native to certain regions. The specific classification of Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata also includes its taxonomic rank within the kingdom Plantae. Further classification may involve details such as species, genus, family, and kingdom levels.
